scenarioName: Happy path: CLIENT + CAPTAIN + VICE signup -> roster -> booking -> matching -> complete -> client rates duo -> companions rate client
objective: Validate the full end-to-end Ratings flow: client creates booking and completes matching; booking transitions to COMPLETED; client submits CLIENT_RATING_DUO with stars+tags+comment; DB booking_ratings row exists; both companions' average_rating is recomputed. Optionally extend coverage by having each companion submit COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT without affecting companion averages.
preconditions: DATABASE_URL set for the test runner and points to the test database
INTERNAL_API_TOKEN exported in the shell running the test runner (used for internal roster endpoints)
No existing users with the generated RUN_ID-suffixed emails

steps.description: CLIENT signs up
steps.layman: Create the client account that will create a booking and submit the duo rating.

steps.description: Extract CLIENT verification token from Mailpit
steps.layman: Grab the email verification token so the client can log in.

steps.description: Verify CLIENT email
steps.layman: Verify the client email address.

steps.description: Login CLIENT
steps.layman: Log the client in and store their Bearer token.

steps.description: COMPANION A signs up (intended CAPTAIN)
steps.layman: Create the companion that we will force to be the CAPTAIN for deterministic matching steps.

steps.description: Extract COMPANION A verification token from Mailpit
steps.layman: Grab companion A's verification token so they can log in.

steps.description: Verify COMPANION A email
steps.layman: Verify companion A's email address.

steps.description: Login COMPANION A
steps.layman: Log companion A in and store their Bearer token.

steps.description: COMPANION B signs up (intended VICE_CAPTAIN)
steps.layman: Create the companion that we will force to be the VICE_CAPTAIN for deterministic matching steps.

steps.description: Extract COMPANION B verification token from Mailpit
steps.layman: Grab companion B's verification token so they can log in.

steps.description: Verify COMPANION B email
steps.layman: Verify companion B's email address.

steps.description: Login COMPANION B
steps.layman: Log companion B in and store their Bearer token.

steps.query: UPDATE companion_profiles SET designation = 'CAPTAIN' WHERE user_id = '{{companionAUserId}}';
steps.description: Force COMPANION A designation to CAPTAIN (test-only determinism)
steps.layman: Make companion A the CAPTAIN deterministically so we can use CAPTAIN-only matching endpoints.

steps.query: UPDATE companion_profiles SET designation = 'VICE_CAPTAIN' WHERE user_id = '{{companionBUserId}}';
steps.description: Force COMPANION B designation to VICE_CAPTAIN (test-only determinism)
steps.layman: Make companion B the VICE_CAPTAIN deterministically so we can use VICE-only com-match verification.

steps.description: Populate roster for CAPTAIN at Ratings venue
steps.layman: Attach the CAPTAIN to the journey venue and generate roster availability slots.

steps.description: Populate roster for VICE_CAPTAIN at Ratings venue
steps.layman: Attach the VICE_CAPTAIN to the journey venue and generate roster availability slots.

steps.description: Client fetches availability for Ratings venue (today) and selects first startAt
steps.layman: Get a valid, bookable start time so booking creation is deterministic and uses real availability.

steps.description: Client creates booking at first available start time
steps.layman: Create a booking that allocates a CAPTAIN+VICE duo at the journey venue.

steps.query: UPDATE booking_companion_assignments SET presence_status = 'ARRIVED' WHERE booking_id = '{{bookingId}}';
steps.description: Mark both companions ARRIVED (test-only) to unlock com-match context/verify
steps.layman: Simulate both companions arriving at the venue so self-match can proceed (com-match requires ARRIVED for both).

steps.description: CAPTAIN fetches com-match context (QR/PIN for self-match)
steps.layman: Retrieve the QR/PIN needed for the VICE_CAPTAIN to verify companion-companion self-match.

steps.description: VICE_CAPTAIN verifies com-match using CAPTAIN QR
steps.layman: Complete companion-companion self-match so client match verification becomes allowed.

steps.description: CLIENT starts client-match (location sharing) within venue radius
steps.layman: Start the client matching flow, proving the client is physically at the venue (within radius).

steps.description: CLIENT fetches matching context to obtain client QR/PIN
steps.layman: Fetch the client QR/PIN that the CAPTAIN will use to verify client match.

steps.description: CAPTAIN verifies client-match using client's QR (booking becomes ACTIVE)
steps.layman: Complete client-companion matching and transition the booking into ACTIVE state.

steps.description: DB check: booking status is ACTIVE after matching
steps.layman: Prove the system transitioned the booking to ACTIVE after client-match verify.

steps.query: UPDATE bookings SET status = 'COMPLETED', start_at = now() - interval '121 minutes', end_at = now() - interval '1 minute' WHERE id = '{{bookingId}}';
steps.description: Simulate end-of-session completion (test-only)
steps.layman: Transition booking into a rating-eligible end state (COMPLETED) in a deterministic way for the journey.

steps.description: Release roster slots for the booking (internal)
steps.layman: Mirror the auto-end side effect by releasing booked roster slots.

steps.description: DB check: booking status is COMPLETED
steps.layman: Prove the booking is now in COMPLETED state, which is eligible for rating submission.

steps.description: CLIENT submits CLIENT_RATING_DUO (stars present, tags>=1, comment<=300)
steps.layman: Submit the client duo rating with non-null stars to trigger average_rating recomputation.

steps.description: API response validation: client rating created
steps.layman: Verify the rating creation response payload matches the expected contract and inferred ratingType.

steps.query: WHERE booking_id = {{bookingId}} AND rating_type = 'CLIENT_RATING_DUO' AND rater_user_id = {{clientUserId}}
steps.description: DB check: booking_ratings row exists for CLIENT_RATING_DUO
steps.layman: Prove the immutable booking_ratings row was created for the client duo rating.

steps.description: DB check: CAPTAIN average_rating recomputed
steps.layman: Verify the CAPTAIN companion profile average_rating was updated based on CLIENT_RATING_DUO with non-null stars.

steps.description: DB check: VICE_CAPTAIN average_rating recomputed
steps.layman: Verify the VICE_CAPTAIN companion profile average_rating was updated based on the same CLIENT_RATING_DUO.

steps.description: CAPTAIN submits COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT
steps.layman: Exercise multi-role usage of the same endpoint: a companion rates the client (stars mandatory).

steps.description: API response validation: captain rating created
steps.layman: Verify the companion rating response uses COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT and includes the expected fields.

steps.description: VICE_CAPTAIN submits COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT
steps.layman: Confirm a second companion can independently rate the client for the same booking.

steps.description: API response validation: vice-captain rating created
steps.layman: Verify the vice captain rating is created and returned with the correct inferred ratingType.

steps.query: WHERE booking_id = {{bookingId}} AND rating_type = 'COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT' AND rater_user_id = {{companionAUserId}}
steps.description: DB check: captain COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT row exists
steps.layman: Prove the captain's companion rating row exists in booking_ratings.

steps.query: WHERE booking_id = {{bookingId}} AND rating_type = 'COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT' AND rater_user_id = {{companionBUserId}}
steps.description: DB check: vice-captain COMPANION_RATING_CLIENT row exists
steps.layman: Prove the vice captain's companion rating row exists in booking_ratings.

steps.description: DB check: companion average_rating unchanged by companion->client ratings (captain)
steps.layman: Verify companion_profiles.average_rating remains driven only by CLIENT_RATING_DUO rows (companion ratings should not affect it).

steps.description: DB check: companion average_rating unchanged by companion->client ratings (vice)
steps.layman: Verify the vice captain's average_rating also remains unchanged after companion ratings.

mustNotOccur: Client rating accepted while booking is not COMPLETED/CANCELLED-eligible
Second CLIENT_RATING_DUO row created for same booking+rater (uniqueness breach)
